families.tuning_policy: Fixed task-card recipe; no tuning on structural labels.
families.budget_policy: Training budget and width/grid settings recorded in the protocol field.
families.missing_field_policy: Omit unavailable workflow objects; failed extraction is a missing row with missing_reason.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one product-like positive-control card with support/endpoints/pair rows.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one weak-centered or pruning/symbolic stress card.

families.tuning_policy: Regularization selected by prediction validation loss or a predeclared sparsity budget.
families.budget_policy: Library size, interaction degree, and regularization grid are recorded before scoring.
families.missing_field_policy: No readout, pruning, or symbolic rows unless the implementation exposes them.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one bilinear or mixed-sparse card.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one weak-centered or division/rational card.

families.tuning_policy: Component and interaction budgets are fixed before scoring.
families.budget_policy: Maximum component count and interaction count are recorded in protocol.
families.missing_field_policy: Symbolic and pruning rows are missing unless the adapter exports them.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one product-like pair card.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one nested/compositional or weak-centered card.

families.tuning_policy: Tree count, depth, and pair-scoring rule are predeclared.
families.budget_policy: Candidate budget and verifier budget are recorded separately.
families.missing_field_policy: Candidate-verifier rows are handled by the epim_treegate family; generic tree-interaction rows expose support/endpoints/pair scores.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one product-like card with a candidate and verifier row.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one high-dimensional nuisance or weak-centered card.

families.tuning_policy: Search space, operator set, and search budget are fixed before scoring.
families.budget_policy: Expression complexity and candidate-expression budget are recorded in protocol.
families.missing_field_policy: Expression status does not license support or pair rows unless variables/pair terms are exposed.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one card with known expression operators.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one card where symbolic status and sparse support can disagree.

families.tuning_policy: Candidate generator and verifier scorer are fixed independently.
families.budget_policy: Candidate set size and verifier scorer budget are reported separately.
families.missing_field_policy: Candidate-pair success is not substituted for verified pair success.
families.positive_control_requirement: At least one card where candidate and verifier both recover the pair.
families.stress_card_requirement: At least one card where candidate inclusion succeeds but verifier rank fails.
